arts.ttl: Alistair Johnston wants own part of Celtic history as he targets second Champions League all-nighter after Leipzig high
arts.sum: The Hoops hero didn't get any sleep after dumping the Bundesliga side and he is ready for a repeat this midweek

arts.ttl: Ex-Celtic ace Kieran Tierney makes surprise Arsenal Champions League return
arts.sum: Kieran Tierney is back fit and available for selection for Arsenal against Sporting Lisbon after a period out injured.

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton delivers Celtic vs Rangers quip over furious Roy Keane viral clip
arts.sum: Celtic hero Chris Sutton couldn't resist a jibe at Rangers hero Kris Boyd as he weighed in on Roy Keane's post-match confrontation with a supporter.

arts.ttl: What can Celtic fans expect from Champions League opponents Club Brugge?
arts.sum: Club Brugge travel to Glasgow on Wednesday night to face Celtic full of confidence. The defending Belgian Champions are coming into a key Champions League clash off the back of…
